dashboard.label: Overview
dashboard.definition:
{"title":"Overview","description":"Wearables platform overview","visualizations":{"ov_md":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"markdown":"# Wearables Health

Vendor-neutral health dashboards on the **Wearables data model** вҖ” one set of panels
that work across devices (**Oura**, **Garmin**, and **Withings**).

## Quick start
1. Create **`index=wearables`** (Settings вҶ’ Indexes, or ACS on Cloud).
2. Install + restart Splunk:
 - **TA-oura** (Oura) вҖ” plus **TA-garmin** (Garmin) and **TA-withings** (Withings scale).
 - **wearables** вҖ” this app (data model + dashboards).
 - **hypnogram_viz** + **charge_ring_viz** вҖ” custom visualizations used by the dashboards.
3. Run the vendor ingest (repo-only tooling вҖ” needs a Splunk HEC token; never shipped in the app):
 - **Oura:** `oura_to_hec_with_phi.py` (OAuth token вҶ’ HEC `index=wearables`).
 - **Garmin:** `garmin_to_hec.py` (Path B via `python-garminconnect`) вҖ” see TA-garmin's `INSTALL.md`.
 - **Withings:** `withings_to_hec.py` (OAuth2 вҶ’ HEC) вҖ” body weight & composition; see TA-withings's `INSTALL.md`.
4. Populate the admin KV registries: **`wearable_person_profile`** (`person_id` вҶ’ name / goals)
 and **`wearable_device_profile`** (`device_id` вҶ’ friendly name).
5. Open the dashboards: **Today В· Sleep В· Heart В· Activity В· Wellness В· Device**.

## How it fits together
- **Per-vendor add-ons** (`TA-oura`, `TA-garmin`, `TA-withings`, вҖҰ) ingest each device's data and normalize it
 into canonical fields (`total_sleep_min`, `avg_hr`, `steps`, вҖҰ) + vendor-neutral tags.
- The **Wearables data model** (Sleep / HeartRate / Activity / Workout / Daily / Device) exposes
 those canonical fields вҖ” the dashboards read **only** the model, so a new vendor just works.
- **Ingest scripts live in each vendor add-on's `tools/`** (repo-only, excluded from the `.spl`
 since they hold credentials).

## Access & identity
- Every event carries an indexed **`person_id`** (opaque) + **`vendor`**, stamped at ingest.
- Per-person isolation is enforced by role **`srchFilter`** on `person_id` (RBAC).
- Names / goals / device names come from admin-managed KV lookups (never the access gate).

## Repositories
- **Wearables app** (this): [github.com/narwhaldc/wearables](https://github.com/narwhaldc/wearables)
- **Oura add-on** вҖ” TA-oura: [github.com/narwhaldc/TA-oura](https://github.com/narwhaldc/TA-oura)
- **Garmin add-on** вҖ” TA-garmin: [github.com/narwhaldc/TA-garmin](https://github.com/narwhaldc/TA-garmin)
- **Withings add-on** вҖ” TA-withings: `github.com/narwhaldc/TA-withings` _(publish pending)_
- **Hypnogram viz**: [github.com/narwhaldc/hypnogram_viz](https://github.com/narwhaldc/hypnogram_viz)
- **Charge / Ring viz**: [github.com/narwhaldc/charge_ring_viz](https://github.com/narwhaldc/charge_ring_viz)
- **Legacy single-vendor app** вҖ” oura_health: [github.com/narwhaldc/oura-health-splunk](https://github.com/narwhaldc/oura-health-splunk)

## Status
First-pass quick start. Dashboards are migrating off the single-vendor **oura_health** app
(the GA fallback). Requires `index=wearables`, `TA-oura`, and person_id-based RBAC.
","backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)"}}},"dataSources":{},"inputs":{},"layout":{"type":"absolute","options":{"width":1440,"height":760,"display":"auto"},"structure":[{"item":"ov_md","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":20,"w":1400,"h":720}}],"globalInputs":[]}}
